name: Rohit Vipin Mathews
title: Director - Engineering & Architecture
headline: 15 years building engineering organisations, cloud-native platforms, and AI-enabled systems. Led 350+ engineers across USA onshore and India offshore. Open to Director, VP Engineering, Platform, Architecture, and CTO-track roles.
bio:
I build and run large-scale distributed engineering organisations while staying close enough to the architecture to unblock it personally. I've led 350+ engineers across USA onshore and India offshore accounts, scaled four distinct product lines from zero, and owned the AI enablement practice that improved how fast teams shipped by 30%+ across the org.

My work spans the full director-to-architect range: I design engineering cultures where ownership is non-negotiable, teams are indistinguishable from the customer's own engineering org, and every failure is explainable and reproducible by design. I've delivered cloud-native platforms across education, precision agriculture, logistics, and hospitality - and I've run the PoCs, RFPs, architecture proposals, and tiger-team engagements that turn client problems into funded engineering programmes. My teams operate as product engineering organisations embedded with clients - not as delivery vendors. We own outcomes, not tickets.

I believe engineering teams don't win on cost - they win on trust. And trust is earned by solving the hard problems, not the easy ones. I hire for ownership mindset and learning velocity above all else - because in a fast-moving engineering landscape, the ability to grow beats the ability to know.
open_to: Open to Director, VP Engineering, Platform, Architecture, and CTO-track roles

value_propositions.value: 15 years engineering, last 3 as Director leading 350+ engineers across USA onshore and India offshore. Track record across Education, Logistics, Agriculture, and Hospitality. Strong on architecture, delivery execution, and AI enablement. Available for VP Engineering, Platform, Architecture, and CTO-track roles.

I own outcomes, not headcount reports. I design engineering cultures where delivery rhythm is stable, quality is a constraint not a goal, and every technical decision has a business case. I've taken legacy platforms to production cloud-native architecture, built teams from scratch, and reduced operational risk at scale - without slowing the roadmap.

I can modernise your platform, stabilise your engineering org, and get AI into your product roadmap. I've secured $2M+ architecture engagements, cut infrastructure costs 40-55%, and shipped AI systems with measurable productivity and accuracy outcomes. I operate as an owner, not a contractor.
